title: 2 x Miami Magic 3.3L Cylinder 2048g | Nangs Delivery Brisbane
description: 24-hour instant cream charger delivery in Brisbane and surrounding suburbs. Fastest nangs under 20 minutes. Good quality nangs at your doorstep.
og_title: 2 x Miami Magic 3.3L Cylinder 2048g | Nangs Delivery Brisbane
og_description: Comes with 2 plastic release value * New for 2022 * our newest brand ‘Miami Magic’ offers industry leading quality in cylinders and 9g blue cream chargers. The branding theme is based on the GTA game and the Miami lifestyle, this fun new brand is already a worldwide success. Used to prepare all kinds of drinks, cocktails and dishes, ranging from the classic whipped cream to rapid flavour infused cocktails! Try our Miami Magic Infusions today!Made in a state-of-the-art factory, the Miami Magic Infusions Canisters are innovative products designed to maximize efficiency and productivity. Thanks to its larger size, and time-saving refill process, wastage is dramatically reduced (requires regulator kit and adapter hose, sold separately) Outperforms traditional methods such as hand whipping and more modern cream-chargers, with roughly 260 standard chargers per 1 cylinder.3.3L / 2048gListing is for the canister only. Regulator set sold separatelyWARNING Please only dispose or empty canisters. Comes with 1 plastic release value, to ensure disposal of empty cylinders only.
